title: helianthemum × pauanum
intro: Helianthemum × pauanum, also known as Rockrose or Dune Rose, is a hybrid plant species within the Helianthemum genus, resulting from the cross between Helianthemum nummularium and Helianthemum thymifolium. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its antimicrobial, antifungal, and anti-inflammatory properties, making it effective in treating various health issues, including wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory problems. The health benefits of Helianthemum × pauanum include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antioxidant properties, which can contribute to overall well-being and protection against chronic diseases. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are commonly used in folk medicine to harness its medicinal properties and reap its health benefits.
